heading: From the neighborhood
note: Real snippets from public Google reviews (June–July 2026). Swap in Instagram/Facebook posts when the owners connect their accounts — get permission before quoting a post.

posts.author: Eunice
posts.text: Not only was the ramen the perfect taste, sushi was also very fresh. Cherry on top — service is phenomenal. Our new favorite restaurant!!

posts.author: Cynthia Lynn
posts.text: I ordered the beef bowl — bulgogi style marinated beef, seaweed salad, steamed bok choy, soft boiled eggs, fish cake, pickled radishes… the perfect portion and very filling.

posts.author: Kimber Mccue
posts.text: My kids are picky ramen eaters — the women in the front made it exactly how they requested and it was a win!

posts.author: BrigadierGinger
posts.text: Broth was flavorful and noodles were cooked perfectly. I hope this place takes off because it's hard to find good ramen in our area!

posts.author: Brenna B
posts.text: I just love this couple that's making delicious food for the community. What a SCORE!
